    Publications

    Journal Articles

    Enabling fast greenhouse gas emissions inference from satellites with GATES: a Graph-Neural-Network Atmospheric Transport Emulation System Fillola, E., Santos-Rodriguez, R., Tunnicliffe, R., Clark, J. N., Keshtmand, N., Ganesan, A., & Rigby, M. Geoscientific Model Development, 19(5), pp. 1893–1915, March 2026. Open Access

    Conference papers

    Uncertainty assessment in satellite-based greenhouse gas emissions estimates using emulated atmospheric transport Clark, J. N., Fillola, E., Keshtmand, N., Santos-Rodriguez, R., & Rigby, M. BMVC Workshop on Machine Vision for Climate Change (MVCC), 2025. PDF

    Prototype-enhanced prediction in graph neural networks for climate applications Keshtmand, N., Fillola Mayoral, E., Clark, J., Santos-Rodriguez, R., & Rigby, M. ICLR 2025 Workshop on Tackling Climate Change with Machine Learning, 2025. View Paper

    Accelerating GHG emissions inference: A Lagrangian particle dispersion model emulator using graph neural networks Fillola, E., Santos-Rodriguez, R., & Rigby, M. NeurIPS 2023 Workshop on Tackling Climate Change with Machine Learning, 2023. PDF

    A machine learning emulator for Lagrangian particle dispersion model footprints: a case study using NAME Fillola, E., Santos-Rodriguez, R., Manning, A., O’Doherty, S., & Rigby, M. Geoscientific Model Development, 16(7), pp. 1997–2009, April 2023. Open Access

    Conference Abstracts

    Towards a Fully Machine Learning–Driven Methane Emissions Inference Pipeline at Global Scale Fillola, E., Keshtmand, N., Clark, J., Rigby, M., & Santos-Rodriguez, R. EGU General Assembly 2026, EGU26-22809, Copernicus Meetings, March 2026. View Abstract

    From regional to global emulation: characterising regional differences to increase transfer learning performance Clark, J., Fillola, E., Keshtmand, N., Santos-Rodriguez, R., & Rigby, M. EGU General Assembly 2026, EGU26-20966, Copernicus Meetings, March 2026. View Abstract

    Interactive 3D Earth Models in Unity to Visualise TROPOMI Satellite Climate Data Sahota, A., Fillola, E., Ng, A. K. T., Clark, J., Keshtmand, N., Rigby, M., & Santos-Rodriguez, R. EGU General Assembly 2026, EGU26-20973, Copernicus Meetings, March 2026. View Abstract
